Class GitSkipSslValidationCredentialsProvider

java.lang.Object
org.eclipse.jgit.transport.CredentialsProvider
org.springframework.cloud.config.server.support.GitSkipSslValidationCredentialsProvider
public class GitSkipSslValidationCredentialsProvider extends org.eclipse.jgit.transport.CredentialsProvider
A CredentialsProvider that will ignore any SSL validation errors that occur. This is primarily intended as a convenience for testing scenarios where self-signed certificates are being used. This class can be used as a decorator for another CredentialsProvider, adding SSL validation skipping behaviour to a repository that also requires authentication, for example.
Author:
Gareth Clay
